blocks.text: Glimt maul Sporting 3-0 as Hovland opens THE PLAYERS chase

Liverpool stunned in Istanbul, Real Madrid dismantled City 3-0 — Wednesday's Champions League night rewrote the quarter-final picture. Arsenal's draw in Leverkusen barely dents their 7-point Premier League lead.
